title: Argentina Ministry of Economy — Public Debt (SIGADE) and Fiscal Accounts (National Public Administration expenditure/revenue) time series
source_org: Ministerio de Economía, Argentina — Secretaría de Finanzas (public debt) and Oficina Nacional de Presupuesto / ONP (fiscal accounts)
time_coverage: deuda_publica_31-03-2026.xlsx + sigade zip: public debt stock/composition as of 2026-03-31 (quarterly snapshot, latest available as of this session — the debt page publishes a fresh snapshot file each quarter back to 2019, only the latest was retained here); fiscal_result_1993.xls: earliest available annual accrued fiscal result (revenue/expenditure/deficit) table published on the ONP statistical-series page, i.e. fiscal year 1993, used as an early historical anchor; fiscal_series_spaimcc_2024.xlsx: 2024 vintage of the 'SPAIMCC' national-public-sector income/expenditure series (base-2004 GDP methodology).
units: debt: USD/ARS depending on instrument, described in file; fiscal accounts: current ARS (nominal), described in file
license_terms: Argentine government open data (Ministerio de Economía)
notes: SSL note: www.argentina.gob.ar and www.economia.gob.ar both require curl -k (certificate verification failure with default trust store; WebFetch also failed with 'unable to verify the first certificate') — content itself downloaded fine once verification was bypassed for these specific known Argentine-government domains, no other anomalies. DEBT: page https://www.argentina.gob.ar/economia/finanzas/datos-trimestrales-de-la-deuda lists a full quarterly archive back to 2019 (one xlsx snapshot + one SIGADE database zip per quarter); only the latest (2026-Q1, as of 31-03-2026) was downloaded to keep this dataset scoped — earlier quarters are all directly downloadable from the same page pattern if a full run-series is wanted later. FISCAL ACCOUNTS: https://www.economia.gob.ar/onp/estadisticas/ is a large index of ~86 individual xls/xlsx files (one per year/vintage, several parallel naming schemes reflecting GDP-base revisions: 'resultado/devengado/YYYY/YYYY.xls' annual accrued fiscal-result tables from 1993-2016, and 'series/serieYYYY.xls' / 'series/spaimccYYYY.xls' / 'series/spaccYYYY.xls' expenditure-by-function-and-economic-nature series from 2004-2024 under different base-year/coverage revisions) — rather than downloading all 86 files, the earliest (1993, the oldest fiscal-result table on the page) and the most recent consolidated series (spaimcc2024.xlsx) were selected as historical-anchor + current-snapshot per bookkeeping.md's size-discipline guidance to prefer targeted extracts. A single master historical time-series file spanning the full period was not found — the ONP page is structured as per-year/per-vintage files only.
